PETITIONER THOMPSON PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INC. PETITION TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD AND CONFIRM AS CORRECTED, AND RESPONDENT'S ROSS MCDONALD COMPANY, INC.'S REQUEST TO CONFIRM AWARD OF ARBITRATOR. THE COURT FINDS THE ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SHOULD BE CONFIRMED AS MADE BY ARBITRATOR FREDERICK FLOWERS. THEREFORE, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE PETITION IS DISMISSED AND THE REQUEST TO CONFIRM THE AWRD IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP. SEC. 1285.2. IT IS FURTHERED ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT SHALL RECOVER ITS COSTS TO OBTAIN CONFIRMATION OF THE AWARD IN THE POST-ARBITRATION JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS PURSUANT TI CCP SEC. 1293.2
